variants.subject: {{companyName}} – Conversion increase, zero cost
variants.body:
Hi {{firstName}}, 

Hope you had chance to run the FREE AI Diagnostic?

AI agents mean tasks that would previously take days across departments are done in seconds. 

Most property and conveyancing firms like {{companyName}} discover significant revenue leakage hiding in plain sight. RESG UK increased revenue by 400% from 2023-2024 – the competition couldn't keep up.

Quick question: when potential clients enquire about conveyancing services, what % convert to instructed matters? Our clients hit 34% improvement within 60 days… The gap? Advisors guessing scripts and performing repetitive tasks, instead of focusing on revenue generating tasks only. 

We've seen sales reps: 
- Requesting docs and facilitating compliance 
- Engaging leads which should have booked automatically 
- Getting ghosted and losing motivation 
- Missing KPI targets, blaming lead quality and engaging new leads too slowly
- Following outdated sales SOPs 

Our system fixes this automatically. No software swap. Just added revenue. 

Does pinning down your exact conversion gap interest you? 

Best wishes,

variants.subject: {{firstName}} – "if you don't measure it, you can't manage it"
variants.body:
Hi {{firstName}}, 

"If you don't measure it, you can't manage it." and "you don't know what you don't know" are our mantras. 

We've seen so many firms miss the silent killers which eat profits like termites eat wood – you probably don't even see them! 

Here's a small sample: 

Time-to-lead engagement: how fast you conversationally engage (more than 1hr = 67% fewer conversions) 
Lead Velocity Rate: Speed of leads moving from initial contact to qualified opportunity 
Pipeline Coverage Ratio: Ratio of pipeline value to sales quota 
Sales Cycle Length: Average days from lead to close 

There are many more, and missing just one vital stat leaves a big hole in your bucket. Our Clarity Engine tracks EVERY vital metric automatically, and in one place. 

What you fix: Advisor bottlenecks, process leaks, revenue gaps. 
Result: MASSIVE close rate lift from metrics you didn't know existed. 

Does seeing your hidden conversion gaps interest you? 

Find out if it might work for you here: Diagnose My Business 

Takes less than 3 minutes - Get immediate results - Completely free.  

Best wishes, 
{{accountSignature}}

variants.subject: {{firstName}} - eliminate document request risk, increase adherence
variants.body:
Hi {{firstName}}, 

Quick risk question for {{companyName}}: when clients email sensitive docs, what happens if they fat-finger the address? 

GDPR/ICO reality: Wrong recipient = £20M fine risk (E.g. British Airways in 2020). 

Email chains also fail "secure processing" audits. Most "docu-sign" portals claim compliance but store on US servers – not UK data protection territory.

Add generic branding into the mix and you have zero trust, and poor response rates (lots of chasing). 

Our Branded Document Request Portal fixes this: 
- UK servers only 
– ICO/GDPR bulletproof 
- Your logo/domain (you actually OWN it)
– client trust goes up, and so does response rate 
- Auto chases late documents so your team don't have to 
- docs auto-delete post-processing 
- Audit trail – every upload tracked 

Result: Zero compliance risk + 47% faster client onboarding (no back-and-forth) and 40% increase in adherence. 

Does client doc security + speed interest you? Reach out to book a quick call or use our FREE AI Diagnostic to see if there's a good use case for {{companyName}}

Best wishes, 
{{accountSignature}}

variants.subject: {{firstName}} - No longer "the big that beats the small" it's "the fast that runs over the slow"
variants.body:
Hi {{firstName}}, 

It's no longer "the big that beats the small" it's "the fast that runs over the slow" 

Engagement Latency: The time gap between customer interest and your business's meaningful response. 

Your competition are already closing this gap with AI. If you don't program instantaneous conversational AI agents by phone/SMS/Email, you're invisible… 

That lead who reached out on a Sunday or 9pm at night? Your competitor's system picked them up and closed the sale before you're even back in the office. 

Speed is now the ultimate currency and 'lead response latency' is the difference between closing a deal and losing it to a competitor who instantly responds. Most companies believe buying updated software fixes this, but they lack the adaptive ecosystem to make it work. You have the tools... but not the strategy. 

Our team measures and optimizes: 
1. Engagement Latency 
2. Handling Time vs. Deflection Savings 
3. Opportunity Cost 

Sounds like it should be expensive, but our system works so well that you only pay if we increase your revenue. 

Run your engagement figures through our FREE AI Diagnostic to find out how much money you're losing to latency: 

Best wishes,
{{accountSignature}}

variants.subject: {{firstName}} – are vague leads killing your close rates?
variants.body:
Hi {{firstName}}, 

Did you know that most marketing agencies focus on stats like 'cost per lead'. Often the cheapest leads have the poorest impact on overall revenue. Agencies bragging about low lead costs and volume is great, but how many of them actually BOUGHT? 

If your marketing strategy does this, and uses out of date A/B split testing, we should book a call. 

It's vital to measure the downstream revenue impact of your strategies (i.e. which ads make the most money?) rather than basic basic online platform metrics.

AI multivariate testing is the future. If you're not testing a high number of messaging and creative options every week, and their impact on actual revenue, your competition will be in no time. 

Our system fixes this automatically: 
- Martech multivariate (not A/B split testing!) across landing pages, forms, CTAs, AI agent comms
- Conversion modules → pixel data to ad platforms (right avatar = 3x ROAS) 
- AI agents + creative optimization (tested vs your current set up) 
- Integrates over existing CRM, no upheaval 

Does dialling in your ad→close funnel interest you? 
see if it will work for your business

Best wishes, 
{{accountSignature}}
